channel.title: Daily News (Personal Briefing)
channel.description: A personal morning news briefing covering AI, marketing, higher education, Canadian policy, BC local news, and global business.
channel.itunes:author: Daily News

item.title: Daily News for Sunday, May 24, 2026
item.description: The dominant signal this Sunday is geopolitical: the US-Iran deal is either hours from being signed or from collapsing, and the Strait of Hormuz outcome will ripple through energy costs and global supply chains — relevant to every client conversation you'll have this week. Closer...
